message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class Application {
  Scanner input
  --
  + main()
  + readName()
  + readAuthor()
  + makeJS()
  + makeCSS()
  + craftHTML()
}

class FileIO {
  - File inputFile
  --
  + setInputFile()
  + closeInput()
  + readFromFile()
  + writeToFile()
}

class DirectoryIO {
  - String parentDir
  --
  + DirectoryIO()
  + setParentDir()
  + mkDir()
  + writeToFile()
}

DirectoryIO --|> FileIO
@enduml
